Bash(python3 -c "
import json, glob
from collections import Counter
# Check for duplicate utteranceIds \(same utterance with intermediate + final\)
dupes = 0
total_convs = 0
for f in glob.glob\(''/Users/xnxn040/PycharmProjects/notifications-spike/calls/*.jsonl''\):
    total_convs += 1
    utt_ids = []
    for line in open\(f\):
        evt = json.loads\(line\)
        utt_ids.append\(evt[''transcript''][''utteranceId'']\)
    counts = Counter\(utt_ids\)
    dupes += sum\(1 for c in counts.values\(\) if c > 1\)
print\(f''Conversations: {total_convs}''\)
print\(f''Conversations with duplicate utteranceIds: {dupes}''\)
")

Bash(python3 -c "
import json, glob
from datetime import datetime
# Check date range and time spread
min_ts = float\(''inf''\)
max_ts = 0
hours = set\(\)
for f in glob.glob\(''/Users/xnxn040/PycharmProjects/notifications-spike/calls/*.jsonl''\):
    for line in open\(f\):
        evt = json.loads\(line\)
        ts = evt[''receivedAt'']
        if ts < min_ts: min_ts = ts
        if ts > max_ts: max_ts = ts
        hours.add\(datetime.fromtimestamp\(ts\).hour\)
print\(f''Date range: {datetime.fromtimestamp\(min_ts\)} to {datetime.fromtimestamp\(max_ts\)}''\)
print\(f''Hours present: {sorted\(hours\)}''\)
print\(f''Days spanned: {\(max_ts - min_ts\) / 86400:.1f}''\)
")

Bash(uv run python -c "
import json
import warnings
from datetime import datetime, timezone
from pathlib import Path
from typing import Any, Dict, List, Optional, Tuple
import numpy as np
import pandas as pd

warnings.filterwarnings\(''ignore'', category=FutureWarning\)

CALLS_DIR = Path\(''calls''\)
assert CALLS_DIR.exists\(\)
jsonl_files = sorted\(CALLS_DIR.glob\(''*.jsonl''\)\)
print\(f''JSONL files found: {len\(jsonl_files\)}''\)

def load_conversation_file\(file_path\):
    events = []
    with file_path.open\(''r'', encoding=''utf-8''\) as f:
        for line_num, line in enumerate\(f, start=1\):
            line = line.strip\(\)
            if not line:
                continue
            try:
                event = json.loads\(line\)
            except json.JSONDecodeError:
                continue
            if not all\(k in event for k in \(''conversationId'', ''receivedAt'', ''transcript''\)\):
                continue
            transcript = event[''transcript'']
            alternatives = transcript.get\(''alternatives'', []\)
            if not alternatives:
                continue
            events.append\(event\)
    return events

def load_all_conversations\(calls_dir, sample_size=None\):
    files = sorted\(calls_dir.glob\(''*.jsonl''\)\)
    if sample_size is not None:
        files = files[:sample_size]
    conversations = {}
    total_events = 0
    for file_path in files:
        events = load_conversation_file\(file_path\)
        if events:
            conv_id = events[0][''conversationId'']
            conversations[conv_id] = events
            total_events += len\(events\)
    print\(f''Conversations loaded: {len\(conversations\)}, Total events: {total_events}''\)
    return conversations

conversations = load_all_conversations\(CALLS_DIR\)

def calculate_conversation_latency\(events, conversation_id\):
    if len\(events\) < 2:
        return None
    first_event = min\(events, key=lambda e: e[''transcript''][''alternatives''][0][''offsetMs'']\)
    first_offset_ms = first_event[''transcript''][''alternatives''][0][''offsetMs'']
    first_received_at = first_event[''receivedAt'']
    conversation_start_time = first_received_at - \(first_offset_ms / 1000.0\)
    rows = []
    for event in events:
        transcript = event[''transcript'']
        alt = transcript[''alternatives''][0]
        offset_ms = alt[''offsetMs'']
        duration_ms = alt[''durationMs'']
        received_at = event[''receivedAt'']
        audio_end_ms = offset_ms + duration_ms
        audio_finish_time = conversation_start_time + \(audio_end_ms / 1000.0\)
        latency_seconds = received_at - audio_finish_time
        transcript_text = alt.get\(''transcript'', ''''\)
        rows.append\({
            ''conversation_id'': conversation_id,
            ''utterance_id'': transcript.get\(''utteranceId'', ''''\),
            ''channel'': transcript.get\(''channel'', ''UNKNOWN''\),
            ''is_final'': transcript.get\(''isFinal'', False\),
            ''offset_ms'': offset_ms,
            ''duration_ms'': duration_ms,
            ''audio_finish_time'': audio_finish_time,
            ''received_at'': received_at,
            ''latency_seconds'': latency_seconds,
            ''confidence'': alt.get\(''confidence'', np.nan\),
            ''transcript_text'': transcript_text,
            ''decorated_text'': alt.get\(''decoratedTranscript'', transcript_text\),
            ''word_count'': len\(transcript_text.split\(\)\) if transcript_text else 0,
        }\)
    df = pd.DataFrame\(rows\)
    df[''anomaly''] = ''normal''
    df.loc[df[''latency_seconds''] < 0, ''anomaly''] = ''negative''
    df.loc[df[''latency_seconds''] > 60, ''anomaly''] = ''extreme_high''
    df.loc[\(df[''latency_seconds''] > 5\) & \(df[''latency_seconds''] <= 60\), ''anomaly''] = ''high''
    return df

frames = []
skipped = 0
for conv_id, events in conversations.items\(\):
    df = calculate_conversation_latency\(events, conv_id\)
    if df is None:
        skipped += 1
        continue
    frames.append\(df\)

result = pd.concat\(frames, ignore_index=True\)
result[''received_dt''] = pd.to_datetime\(result[''received_at''], unit=''s'', utc=True\)
result[''conversation_date''] = result[''received_dt''].dt.date
result[''hour_of_day''] = result[''received_dt''].dt.hour
result[''day_of_week''] = result[''received_dt''].dt.day_name\(\)

print\(f''Total utterances: {len\(result\)}, Skipped: {skipped}''\)
print\(f''Negative latencies: {\(result[""latency_seconds""] < 0\).sum\(\)}''\)
print\(f''Latency > 5s: {\(result[""latency_seconds""] > 5\).sum\(\)}''\)

valid = result[result[''latency_seconds''] >= 0][''latency_seconds'']
print\(f''\\nLatency Stats \(non-negative\):''\)
print\(f''  Mean:   {valid.mean\(\):.3f}s''\)
print\(f''  Median: {valid.median\(\):.3f}s''\)
print\(f''  p95:    {valid.quantile\(0.95\):.3f}s''\)
print\(f''  p99:    {valid.quantile\(0.99\):.3f}s''\)
print\(f''  Max:    {valid.max\(\):.3f}s''\)

for ch in [''INTERNAL'', ''EXTERNAL'']:
    ch_data = result[\(result[''channel''] == ch\) & \(result[''latency_seconds''] >= 0\)][''latency_seconds'']
    print\(f''\\n{ch}: median={ch_data.median\(\):.3f}s, p95={ch_data.quantile\(0.95\):.3f}s, n={len\(ch_data\)}''\)
")

Bash(uv run python -c "
import json
from pathlib import Path

# Look at one conversation in detail
f = Path\(''calls/02ecc434-d65b-491e-9555-59aa3949d046.jsonl''\)
events = [json.loads\(line\) for line in f.open\(\)]

# Current approach: anchor on min offsetMs
first = min\(events, key=lambda e: e[''transcript''][''alternatives''][0][''offsetMs'']\)
first_offset = first[''transcript''][''alternatives''][0][''offsetMs'']
first_dur = first[''transcript''][''alternatives''][0][''durationMs'']
first_recv = first[''receivedAt'']

# Method A: original \(anchor on audio START of min-offset event\)
start_a = first_recv - \(first_offset / 1000.0\)

# Method B: anchor on audio END \(offsetMs + durationMs\)
start_b = first_recv - \(\(first_offset + first_dur\) / 1000.0\)

# Method C: use min\(receivedAt - \(offsetMs + durationMs\)/1000\) across ALL events
candidates = [
    e[''receivedAt''] - \(e[''transcript''][''alternatives''][0][''offsetMs''] + e[''transcript''][''alternatives''][0][''durationMs'']\) / 1000.0
    for e in events
]
start_c = min\(candidates\)

print\(''Conversation: 02ecc434-...''\)
print\(f''Events: {len\(events\)}''\)
print\(f''First event: offsetMs={first_offset}, durationMs={first_dur}, receivedAt={first_recv}''\)
print\(\)
print\(f''Method A \(original - anchor audio START\): conversation_start={start_a:.3f}''\)
print\(f''Method B \(anchor audio END\):              conversation_start={start_b:.3f}''\)
print\(f''Method C \(min upper bound\):               conversation_start={start_c:.3f}''\)
print\(\)

for label, start in [\(''A'', start_a\), \(''B'', start_b\), \(''C'', start_c\)]:
    negatives = 0
    latencies = []
    for e in events:
        alt = e[''transcript''][''alternatives''][0]
        audio_end = start + \(alt[''offsetMs''] + alt[''durationMs'']\) / 1000.0
        lat = e[''receivedAt''] - audio_end
        latencies.append\(lat\)
        if lat < 0:
            negatives += 1
    import numpy as np
    arr = [l for l in latencies if l >= 0]
    print\(f''Method {label}: negatives={negatives}/{len\(events\)}, '', end=''''\)
    if arr:
        print\(f''valid mean={np.mean\(arr\):.3f}s, valid median={np.median\(arr\):.3f}s''\)
    else:
        print\(''no valid latencies''\)
")

Bash(uv run python -c "
import json, numpy as np, pandas as pd
from pathlib import Path

CALLS_DIR = Path\(''calls''\)
frames = []
skipped = 0

for fp in sorted\(CALLS_DIR.glob\(''*.jsonl''\)\):
    events = []
    for line in fp.open\(\):
        events.append\(json.loads\(line.strip\(\)\)\)
    if len\(events\) < 2:
        skipped += 1
        continue
    conv_id = events[0][''conversationId'']
    
    # Method C: min upper bound on conversation_start_time
    candidates = [
        e[''receivedAt''] - \(e[''transcript''][''alternatives''][0][''offsetMs''] + e[''transcript''][''alternatives''][0][''durationMs'']\) / 1000.0
        for e in events
    ]
    conversation_start_time = min\(candidates\)
    
    rows = []
    for e in events:
        alt = e[''transcript''][''alternatives''][0]
        offset_ms = alt[''offsetMs'']
        duration_ms = alt[''durationMs'']
        audio_finish_time = conversation_start_time + \(offset_ms + duration_ms\) / 1000.0
        latency = e[''receivedAt''] - audio_finish_time
        rows.append\({
            ''conversation_id'': conv_id,
            ''channel'': e[''transcript''].get\(''channel'', ''UNKNOWN''\),
            ''latency_seconds'': latency,
            ''duration_ms'': duration_ms,
            ''confidence'': alt.get\(''confidence'', float\(''nan''\)\),
            ''word_count'': len\(alt.get\(''transcript'', ''''\).split\(\)\),
        }\)
    frames.append\(pd.DataFrame\(rows\)\)

df = pd.concat\(frames, ignore_index=True\)
print\(f''Total utterances: {len\(df\)}, Skipped: {skipped}''\)
print\(f''Negative latencies: {\(df[""latency_seconds""] < 0\).sum\(\)}''\)
print\(f''Zero latencies \(anchor events\): {\(df[""latency_seconds""] == 0\).sum\(\)}''\)
print\(\)
print\(f''Latency Stats \(all events\):''\)
print\(f''  Mean:   {df[""latency_seconds""].mean\(\):.3f}s''\)
print\(f''  Median: {df[""latency_seconds""].median\(\):.3f}s''\)
print\(f''  p95:    {df[""latency_seconds""].quantile\(0.95\):.3f}s''\)
print\(f''  p99:    {df[""latency_seconds""].quantile\(0.99\):.3f}s''\)
print\(f''  Max:    {df[""latency_seconds""].max\(\):.3f}s''\)
print\(f''  Min:    {df[""latency_seconds""].min\(\):.3f}s''\)

for ch in [''INTERNAL'', ''EXTERNAL'']:
    d = df[df[''channel''] == ch][''latency_seconds'']
    print\(f''\\n{ch}: mean={d.mean\(\):.3f}s, median={d.median\(\):.3f}s, p95={d.quantile\(0.95\):.3f}s, n={len\(d\)}''\)
")

Bash(uv run python -c "
import json, pandas as pd, numpy as np
from pathlib import Path

# Load all confidence scores
confs = []
for f in sorted\(Path\(''calls''\).glob\(''*.jsonl''\)\):
    for line in f.open\(\):
        e = json.loads\(line\)
        confs.append\(e[''transcript''][''alternatives''][0].get\(''confidence'', float\(''nan''\)\)\)

s = pd.Series\(confs\)
print\(''Confidence score distribution:''\)
print\(s.describe\(\).round\(4\).to_string\(\)\)
print\(\)
print\(''Quartile boundaries \(qcut\):''\)
_, bins = pd.qcut\(s, q=4, retbins=True\)
print\(f''  Q1: [{bins[0]:.4f}, {bins[1]:.4f}\)''\)
print\(f''  Q2: [{bins[1]:.4f}, {bins[2]:.4f}\)''\)
print\(f''  Q3: [{bins[2]:.4f}, {bins[3]:.4f}\)''\)
print\(f''  Q4: [{bins[3]:.4f}, {bins[4]:.4f}]''\)
print\(\)

# Show what fixed-width bins would look like
print\(''Fixed-width bins \(cut\):''\)
for lo, hi in [\(0, 0.7\), \(0.7, 0.9\), \(0.9, 0.95\), \(0.95, 1.01\)]:
    n = \(\(s >= lo\) & \(s < hi\)\).sum\(\)
    print\(f''  [{lo:.2f}, {hi:.2f}\): {n} events''\)
")
